diff: If a borrower trades unapproved assets or products, this will be discounted or penalized via the margin calculation as noted in section [A.6.1.1.1.3.7.2.2.5 - Unapproved Assets and Products](5163ebb9-a425-4df6-aba9-b483e8a482c1). Repeated or serious instances of holding unapproved positions may result in the position being liquidated to protect the interests of the lender.
